app.name: Hyaecord
moderator.noPermission: You don't have permission to manage channels here.
moderator.entered: Moderator View — select channels, then hold to delete. Esc to exit.
moderator.holdToDelete: Hold to feed to the den
chomper.hidden: {name} hidden and muted. Swipe left on a server icon any time, or restore it in Settings.
settings.chomper.showHidden.description: Swiping a server icon hides and mutes it. Turning this on shows them again and un-mutes them; turning it off re-hides and re-mutes the same servers.
settings.communityTheme.description: Using the default theme's own colours.
themeStore.title: Community Theme Store
themeStore.subtitle: A colour palette on top of your base theme (Light/Dark/AMOLED) — layout and motion stay the same. Submitted and reviewed by the community, hosted free on GitHub.
themeStore.empty: Couldn't reach the theme registry — check your connection and try again later.
themeStore.reverted: Back to the default theme colours.
themeStore.submit.body: Made your own palette? Submit it for review — it costs nothing and takes a few minutes.
login.title: Connect to Discord
login.welcomeBody: This opens Discord's own real login page, or its official QR-code scan — never a form of ours asking for your password. Choose whichever you'd use in a browser or the official app.
login.qr.body: Open Discord on your phone, go to Settings → Scan QR Code, and point it at this — the same QR login the official desktop app uses.
login.qr.confirming: Scanned! Confirm the login on your phone.
login.qr.expired: This code expired. Go back and try again.
login.body: Log in the normal way, with your Discord email and password — the same request the official client makes.
login.useToken: Have a token instead? Use that.
login.mfaBody: This account has two-factor authentication on. Enter the current code from your authenticator app.
login.tokenBody: Advanced option — paste a token directly. Only do this with a token you trust the source of.
login.useCredentials: Use your Discord email and password instead
login.error.invalid-token: Discord rejected that token. Double-check it and try again.
login.error.invalid-credentials: Discord didn't recognise that email/password combination.
login.error.invalid-code: That code wasn't accepted. Check the time on your device and try the next code.
login.error.captcha-unsupported: Discord wants an extra security check (captcha) that Hyaecord can't show yet — this happens most often over a VPN. Try disabling your VPN and logging in again, or use "Log in with Discord" (it shows the real page, which can display the check).
login.vpnNotice: Looks like you might be using a VPN. Discord's login sometimes throws up extra verification for VPN connections — if login gets stuck, try disabling it and retrying.
login.error.mfa-unsupported: This account's two-factor method (SMS or backup codes) isn't supported yet — only authenticator app codes are. Try the token method below.
login.error.network: Couldn't reach Discord. Check your connection and try again.
login.error.empty: Fill in both fields to continue.
login.sessionOnly: No system keyring was found, so this login lasts until you quit — nothing was written to disk.
wizard.title: Welcome to Hyaecord
wizard.subtitle: Let's get you set up. Everything here is optional and explained in plain language.
wizard.theme.title: Theme
wizard.theme.detected.gnome: GNOME detected — matching your system theme.
wizard.theme.detected.kde: KDE Plasma detected — matching your system theme.
wizard.import.title: Import existing login
wizard.import.body: Hyaecord can import your session from Discord, Vesktop, or Equibop so you don't have to log in again.
wizard.integrations.title: Built-in features
wizard.integrations.body: UserPFP, UsrBG, GlobalBadges and RPC Bridge are on by default. Each one can be turned off any time in Settings.
wizard.telemetry.title: Anonymous usage stats
wizard.telemetry.body: Hyaecord sends one small anonymous ping a day — a random ID, app version, OS, and desktop environment. That's how we know how many people use Hyaecord and what to support. It is never linked to your Discord account and contains no messages or personal data. Turn it off here or in Settings at any time.
wizard.tos.title: Before you continue
wizard.tos.body: Hyaecord is a third-party client. Client modifications are against Discord's Terms of Service. Hyaecord ships nothing abusive, but use is at your own discretion.
wizard.import.soon: Importing isn't available yet — it arrives before the first stable release. You can log in normally in the meantime.
settings.title: Settings
settings.support.description: Starring the repo helps more than you'd think — it's how people find the project.
settings.selfPinFade.description: Notices for messages you pin fade out after a short delay.
feature.userPFP.description: Show community profile pictures from the UserPFP database.
feature.usrBG.description: Show custom profile backgrounds from the UsrBG database.
feature.globalBadges.description: Show contributor badges from other client mods, plus the Hyaecord Contributor badge.
feature.rpcBridge.description: Let games and other apps set your Rich Presence without the official client.
settings.telemetry.description: One anonymous ping a day: random ID, version, OS, desktop environment. Never linked to your Discord account. Off means off — nothing is sent.
settings.holdToDisable: Hold the switch to turn off.
